author: builder
summary: Completed wiring of all application services to DatabaseAdapter.Service, replacing direct Database.* calls with the adapter pattern.

files_changed.description: Replaced Database.use/transaction calls with yield* DatabaseAdapter.Service adapter query/transaction patterns
Converted direct database access to adapter pattern
Replaced Database.getPath() and direct db calls with adapter queries
Wired projector state persistence through DatabaseAdapter
Database fence queries migrated to adapter pattern
Migration state tracking via adapter instead of direct Database.*
Sync event storage adapted through DatabaseAdapter

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: All application services use DatabaseAdapter.Service for database access
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: 8 session/project/control-plane/server files migrated from raw Database.* to yield* DatabaseAdapter.Service patterns

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Direct Database.* calls eliminated from production code
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: Remaining raw Database.* calls confined to adapter.ts internals and CLI migration/debug commands

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Type safety preserved through DrizzleLikeClient interface
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: all migrated callers compile with DrizzleLikeClient-compatible signatures

results: All 8 consumer files successfully migrated to adapter pattern. Remaining raw Database.* access paths are confined to adapter internals (SQLiteAdapter wrapping) and CLI-only commands (migrate-to-pg, db.ts debug).
